title: Web Boss Debug Arena
notice: Educational project inspired by EETEPA Vilhena Alves. It is not an official institutional system and does not use real student data.

missions.title: Patch The Visual Bug
missions.story: A card looks broken on the projector because spacing and hierarchy collapsed.
missions.challenge: Identify whether the likely bug is margin, display, or font sizing.
missions.hint: Ask what changed: position, spacing, or text.

missions.title: Unlock Accessibility
missions.story: A user cannot understand a control because the label is missing.
missions.challenge: Choose the HTML improvement that makes the control clearer.
missions.hint: Labels, alt text, contrast, and focus state all matter.

missions.title: Beat The Mobile Boss
missions.story: The layout overflows on a small screen before the final boss is defeated.
missions.challenge: Propose a media-query or grid/flex fix.
missions.hint: One-column mobile layouts often save the day.
